creator: samy.mahmoudi@gmail.com
text:
I used to program in Ada so I had gcc6-aux installed by default on my systems, as well as PATH=/usr/local/gcc6-aux/bin:$PATH set in my shell configurations.

The system which built chromium successfully was missing gcc6-aux (I had previously deleted it to save disk space) so that default c++ was not overridden by gcc6-aux's c++.

I think the failure is reproducible by installing gcc6-aux and granting /usr/local/gcc6-aux/bin a higher priority than /usr/bin in PATH.
